feed.title: Publishing Expert – Tools & Marketing
feed.subtitle: Publishing Expert offers articles and recommendations for low-content, medium-content, and high-content book creators. Discover proven strategies for book promotion, getting real reviews on Amazon, and succeeding in self-publishing.

entry.title: The Importance of High-Quality Interior Content in Your KDP Book: Formatting, Fonts, and Visual Flow

link.title: The Importance of High-Quality Interior Content in Your KDP Book: Formatting, Fonts, and Visual Flow

entry.summary: When most self-published authors think about their book, they focus on the cover, the title, or the keywords. But once a reader opens the book — whether on Kindle or in paperback — it’s the interior quality that determines whether they keep reading, leave a review, or request a refund. Clean, professional formatting is not just about aesthetics. It directly affects readability, perceived value...

entry.title: Why Book Cover Design Matters: Attracting Clicks, Building Trust, and Driving KDP Sales

link.title: Why Book Cover Design Matters: Attracting Clicks, Building Trust, and Driving KDP Sales

entry.summary: When it comes to selling books on Amazon, first impressions aren’t just important — they’re everything. A professionally designed cover is often the single most powerful factor that determines whether a potential buyer clicks on your book or scrolls past it. In a split second, your cover communicates the genre, tone, perceived quality, and credibility of your book — before the reader even read...

entry.title: Why A+ Content Matters for KDP Authors: Trust, Sales, and Brand Building

link.title: Why A+ Content Matters for KDP Authors: Trust, Sales, and Brand Building

entry.summary: When most self-publishers think about improving their Amazon sales, their minds go straight to keywords, ads, or pricing. While those are all critical factors, there’s one powerful — and often overlooked — tool that can significantly boost conversions, increase reader trust, and elevate the perceived value of your book: A+ Content. Originally designed for Amazon sellers and brand owners, A+ Co...

entry.title: How to Write a High-Converting Book Description for Amazon KDP

link.title: How to Write a High-Converting Book Description for Amazon KDP

entry.summary: Your book description on Amazon KDP is not just a summary — it’s a marketing asset that determines whether a potential reader clicks “Buy Now” or scrolls past your listing. A well-crafted description improves your click-through rate (CTR), conversion rate, and search visibility. It’s one of the most powerful levers you control — and too many self-publishers either neglect it or treat it like a...

entry.title: Mastering Book Titles for Amazon KDP: SEO, Psychology, and Sales

link.title: Mastering Book Titles for Amazon KDP: SEO, Psychology, and Sales

entry.summary: Your book title is one of the most critical assets in your self-publishing journey. On Amazon, it’s not just a creative choice — it’s a strategic tool for visibility, discoverability, and conversion. An effective title acts like a mini sales pitch. It tells readers what your book is about, who it’s for, and why they should care — all in just a few words. For self-publishers on Amazon KDP, it’s...
